summary: Iteration 46: All 5 critical fixes verified + all regression tests passed. FIX 1: Lead statuses normalized to German (neu, qualifiziert, termin_gebucht). FIX 2: Hero section has 3 CTAs including direct booking. FIX 3: Contact section has dual CTAs. FIX 4: Contact form submission works. FIX 5: Full booking flow works. All regressions passed (Chat, Admin login, Footer links, Legal pages).

issues: Dashboard stats cards show 0 initially (may be loading delay) - API returns correct data (49 leads)

seed_data_creation: Created test leads via contact form and booking flow during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 fixes verified working. Lead statuses are now German-only (neu, qualifiziert, termin_gebucht). Hero has 3 buttons (Beratung starten, Termin buchen, Leistungen). Contact section has dual CTAs in .contact-cta-group. Booking modal opens directly from hero-booking-btn and contact-booking-btn. Total leads now 49 (increased from 47 due to test submissions).

FIX_1_Lead_Statuses.details: GET /api/admin/stats returns only German statuses: neu (21), termin_gebucht (13), qualifiziert (15). No 'new', 'qualified', or null values.

FIX_2_Hero_CTAs.details: Hero section has 3 buttons: 'Beratung starten' (opens chat), 'Termin buchen' (opens booking modal directly), 'Leistungen' (ghost button anchor link)

FIX_2_Hero_Booking.details: Click hero-booking-btn → booking modal opens directly without going through chat

FIX_3_Contact_CTAs.details: Contact section has dual CTAs in .contact-cta-group: 'Beratung starten' and 'Termin buchen'

FIX_3_Contact_Booking.details: Click contact-booking-btn → booking modal opens directly

FIX_4_Contact_Form.details: Contact form submission with valid data (min 10 chars nachricht) → success message: 'Ihre Nachricht wurde erfolgreich gesendet'

FIX_5_Booking_Flow.details: Full booking flow: Select date (April 6) → Select time (09:00) → Fill form → Submit → 'Termin bestätigt' success with confirmation email

REGRESSION_Chat.details: Chat opens, sends message, receives AI response

REGRESSION_Admin_Stats.details: API returns correct stats: 49 total leads, 18 upcoming bookings, German statuses only
